message.content:
Thoroughly review ALL client source files in /home/user/Decode-App/client/src/ for bugs, type errors, logic errors, broken imports, unused imports, missing exports, and runtime issues. Focus especially on:

1. All component files in client/src/components/ — check for broken props, missing state, bad event handlers, incorrect conditional rendering
2. client/src/store.ts — check all localStorage helpers, date logic, exported functions
3. client/src/data/ — check all exports, types, ensure barrel file exports everything correctly
4. client/src/api.ts — check API client for issues
5. client/src/App.tsx — check tab navigation, swipe logic, component integration
6. client/src/types.ts — check type definitions match usage
7. client/src/lib/ — check utility files

Report every bug you find with file path, line number, and description of the issue. Be very thorough.

content.text: There's an issue with the selected model (claude-haiku-4-5@20251001). It may not exist or you may not have access to it. Run /model to pick a different model.
